method: Headless MeshVault MCP inspection (load_model + describe_scene + 3 renders at az 30/135/-90) of two representative bundles per backend/task group, plus the certified texture-QA record where it applies. Scores are qualitative human-reviewable judgments on a 1-5 scale; every render is versioned in this folder so reviewers can re-judge independently.

scale.5: production-ready against the input at close inspection
scale.2: weak; major deviation from the subject

triposr/i23d.evidence: Starship geometry is blob-accreted with mushy superstructure; face is relief-flattened with a weak cranium. Observed-view texture regions are faithful; sides carry smearing and speckle.

triposr/t23d.evidence: Owl silhouette correct but soft detail; chair keeps thin legs after cleanup but with wobble. Woven-seat texture reads well frontally, degrades off-axis.

hunyuan3d21/i23d.evidence: Watertight single bodies; hull antennae and facial structure preserved; multi-view conditioning fixes the back of the head. Textures certified (texture_qa 13/13); residual proven-limit classes documented in the certification (eye-region slivers are geometry, tone band at photo handoff).

hunyuan3d21/t23d.evidence: Owl carving relief crisp at close range (certified 13/13); chair solid with slight seat-weave softening. Unseen-region fill is coherent after the zero-defect program.

step1x/i23d.evidence: Geometry-only backend (no texture stage). Espresso machine blocky but recognizable on the base-checkpoint fallback; owl remains weak (repo benchmark language: below bar).

step1x/t23d.evidence: Teapot recognizable and clean; chair materially better than the historical blob baseline but still below bar (thin members malformed).
